description: Counts current registered passenger cars in fixed first-registration-year age bands. Use for broad age-cohort questions. For exact thresholds such as older than 10 years, use dmr-car-age-threshold-summary.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2030 | EVAL age_band = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 2005, "Before 2005", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2005-2009", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2015, "2010-2014", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2015-2019", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2023, "2020-2022", "2023 or newer") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY age_band | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10
